emails.body: Re: Dominion gas supply Tallahassee deal on Florida Do we want to contest, if possible? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL> Sent: Tue Mar 26 11:00:52 2002

emails.subject: FW: Dominion gas supply Tallahassee deal on Florida

emails.body: FW: Dominion gas supply Tallahassee deal on Florida Louis Dicarlo said you should chat with Sara Shackleton about the Dominion ISDA agreement. BUT you may already be doing that.

emails.subject: RE: Dominion gas supply Tallahassee deal on Florida
emails.subject_base: Dominion gas supply Tallahassee deal on Florida
emails.body: You are my hero. I am going to have a 2 day backup plan just in case Dominion doesn't deliver any gas. To: Germany, Chris

emails.subject: RE: Dominion gas supply Tallahassee deal on Florida
emails.subject_base: Dominion gas supply Tallahassee deal on Florida
emails.body: I've left a message for Dominion's counsel, telling him that we disagree with their position that they can terminate the gas contract, and asking him to educate us as to why they don't think that action is stayed. We can follow up with a letter suggesting that we believe their termination is wrongful, unless Mark disagrees. Second issue is whether we should attempt to pay for the gas anyway, since they have to deliver gas paid for prior to termination. Kay
